title: Flxme 50k
description: Minecraft 16x Texture Pack for Flxme to celebrate 50,000 subscribers.
body:
# Flxme 50k
A pack designed by Soyyee for Flxme to celebrate hitting 40,000 subscribers. It was designed with the intention of competitive Minecraft PVP to give the best and simplistic experience possible.

## Updates
Designed by [@soyyeee](https://youtube.com/@soyyeee). View changes to the pack by following and by joining [Flxme's discord](https://discord.gg/flxme).

## Terms of Use
The pack is for personal use only and private edits are allowed. **Please do not re-distribute it publicly or make public edits of this pack without contacting Flxme or Soyyee.**
